response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified video title from on-screen text as '#博衣こより生誕Live2026'. 
2. Detected two distinct song segments.
3. Song 1: Lyrics 'もう何十回も何百回も' matched with 'RELAY' (Power Pros Baseball theme). Searched: '"RELAY" Power Pros Baseball Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Song 2: Explicitly titled 'My Soul, Your Beats!' on screen. Searched: '"My Soul, Your Beats!" Angel Beats Japanese and English lyrics'.
5. Mapped segments to timestamps, identified performers as the virtual idols present.
response.global_summary: A live performance medley by VTubers. The first song is 'RELAY' (theme for Power Pros Baseball 2024-2025) and the second is 'My Soul, Your Beats!' (opening theme for Angel Beats!).

scenes.description: VTubers perform 'RELAY' on a virtual stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, IRyS
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は 襟のタイをきつく締め 教室のドアくぐると 本の少し 胸を張って歩き出せる そんな日常に ほんの少し 変化を感じた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I open my eyes again, to a sleepy morning / I tighten the tie of my collar / Passing through the classroom door, I can walk out a little more proudly / In such a daily life, I felt a slight change.

scenes.description: VTubers perform 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. Title appears on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, IRyS

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I open my eyes again, to a sleepy morning / I tighten the tie of my collar / Passing through the classroom door, I can walk out a little more proudly / In such a daily life, I felt a slight change.
